title: Tabbed Interface Demo
code:
tab_count = 3

def on_load_frmMain():
    lblStatus.set_panel_text(0, 'Tabbed interface demo loaded')
    # Set initial tab
    tabMain.set_active_tab(0)

def on_menu_mnuAddTab():
    global tab_count
    tab_count += 1
    new_tab = tabMain.add_tab(f'Tab {tab_count}', f'tab{tab_count}')
    
    # Add a label to new tab
    # In real implementation, would add controls to new tab
    
    lblStatus.set_panel_text(0, f'Added tab {tab_count}')

def on_menu_mnuRemoveTab():
    global tab_count
    idx = tabMain.get_active_index()
    if tabMain.get_tab_count() > 1:
        tabMain.remove_tab(idx)
        tab_count -= 1
        lblStatus.set_panel_text(0, f'Removed tab at index {idx}')
    else:
        msgbox('Cannot remove last tab', 'Error')

def on_menu_mnuNext():
    tabMain.next_tab()
    update_status()

def on_menu_mnuPrev():
    tabMain.prev_tab()
    update_status()

def on_menu_mnuSave():
    # Collect settings from all tabs
    settings = {
        'name': txtName.caption,
        'email': txtEmail.caption,
        'notifications': chkNotifications.checked,
        'theme': lstTheme.items[lstTheme.selected_index] if lstTheme.selected_index >= 0 else 'Dark',
        'font_size': sliderFontSize.current_value,
        'proxy': txtProxy.caption,
        'ssl': chkSSL.checked,
        'auto_connect': chkAutoConnect.checked
    }
    
    # Save to file
    handle = open_file('settings.txt', 'w')
    if handle:
        for key, value in settings.items():
            write_line(handle, f'{key}={value}')
        close_file(handle)
        msgbox('Settings saved!', 'Save')
        lblStatus.set_panel_text(0, 'Settings saved')

def on_menu_mnuReset():
    # Reset to defaults
    txtName.caption = 'John Doe'
    txtEmail.caption = 'john@example.com'
    chkNotifications.checked = true
    lstTheme.selected_index = 1
    sliderFontSize.current_value = 12
    txtProxy.caption = ''
    chkSSL.checked = true
    chkAutoConnect.checked = false
    
    lblStatus.set_panel_text(0, 'Settings reset to defaults')

def update_status():
    idx = tabMain.get_active_index()
    tab = tabMain.get_active_tab()
    if tab:
        lblStatus.set_panel_text(1, f'Tab: {tab.caption}')
